audit.title: Internal Audit Service
audit.subtitle: Safeguarding city assets with objective evaluation.

claims.title: Processing of Claims & Payroll
claims.subtitle: Expedient, compliant, and secure public disbursements.

salaryCertification.title: Accounting & Internal Audit Division
salaryCertification.subtitle: Verifying, compiling, and formalizing statutory compensation histories and travel clearance indices.

serviceDetails.name: Issuance of Certification on Salary Received and No Travel Claim
serviceDetails.purpose: Certification on salary received and no travel claim for travel, visa applications, monitoring, court hearings and other official purposes.
serviceDetails.office: Accounting Division and Internal Audit Division

barangay.title: Barangay Affairs Section
barangay.subtitle: Empowering and managing financial systems of micro-political units.

servicesList.name: Barangay Financial Records Custody
servicesList.desc: Systematic indexing, tracking, and safekeeping of all financial journals, ledgers, and transactions submitted by Barangay Treasurers.

servicesList.name: Technical Assistance & Accounting Guidance
servicesList.desc: Conducting localized advisory sessions, workshops, and coaching clinics for Barangay Accountants and Treasurers.

servicesList.name: Review of Barangay Budget Allocations
servicesList.desc: Processing and reviewing the mathematical and procedural correctness of individual Barangay Appropriations and statutory fund transfers.

servicesList.name: Clearance and Certificate Issuance
servicesList.desc: Issuance of Accounting Clearances to outgoing barangay officials ensuring they have properly accounted for all assets.
